title: THREE DEE
description: A Minecraft Mod Pack that makes as many items/block look visually 3D. Making as many things as possible 3D makes the vanilla art style more consistent, and uses various texture packs from various creators to achieve this.
body:
## Ever wanted Minecraft to have more 3D? 

In this modpack there are various resource packs that change as many 2D elements into being **3D**! Adding **3D** to items/blocks makes the game's art style look more _consistent_! As a result your eyes can be more pleased when staring at your screen. This mod also contains [Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium) for performance!

This modpack uses content from various creators so make sure to check them out!






**Mods and Resource Packs Included:**

[3D Fireworks! - PuzzlePacks](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/3d-fireworks)

[Remodeled Doors 3D - Ecorn](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/remodeled-doors)

[Toni's 3D Pink Petals & Wildflowers - Toni_4819](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/tonis-3d-pink-petals-wildflowers)

[Toni's 3D Leaf Litter - Toni_4819](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/tonis-3d-leaf-litter)

[Text Placeholder API - Patbox](https://modrinth.com/mod/placeholder-api)

[Sodium - CaffeineMC](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium)

[Overdetailed Saplings - DedMaxim99](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/overdetailed-saplings)

[Overdetailed Enchanting Table - DedMaxim99](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/overdetailed-enchanting-table)

[Overdetailed Barrel - DedMaxim99](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/overdetailed-barrel)

[No Resource Pack Warnings - Space Walker](https://modrinth.com/mod/no-resource-pack-warnings)

[Mushrooms 3D - Un5k1llful](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/mushrooms-3d)

[Mod Menu - Terraformers](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu)

[Mickey Joe's Note Blocks - mushirmickeyjoe](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/mickey-joes-note-blocks)

[Findrek's 3D Buckets and Fish - Findrek](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/findreks-3d-buckets-and-fish)

[Fabric API - modmuss50](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)

[Drigo 3D Lantern's x Punchy - Drigo](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/drigo-3d-lanterns-x-punchy)

[ChicknTurtle's 3D Totems - ChicknTurtle](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/chicknturtles-3d-totems)

[ChicknTurtle's 3D Tools - ChicknTurtle](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/chicknturtles-3d-tools)

[Ben's Bundles - BennyMcCarthy_](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/bens-bundles)

[Amazing Mace 3d - spunkyinsaan](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/amazing-mace-3d)

[3D Rabbit Hide and Foot - huuue](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/3d-rabbit-hide-and-foot)

[3D Pumpkin Pie - LemonBeee](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/3d-pumpkin-pie)

[3D Nautilus Shell and Armor - huuue](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/3d-nautilus-shell-and-armor)

[3D Music Discs - choptop84](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/3d-music-discs)

[3D Ladders - Nico4play](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/3d-ladders)

[3D Glow Lichen - Marooned](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/3d-glow-lichen)

[3D Default - GeForceLegend](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/3d-default)

[3D Bell Item - Toni_4819](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/3d-bell-item)

[3D Armor Stand Item - TO.Company](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/3d-armor-stand-item)

[[ETF] Entity Texture Features - Traben](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures)

[[EMF] Entity Model Features - Traben](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features)
